description_long: This is a modern athletic soccer cleat featuring a dynamic color scheme of white, orange, and black. The upper is primarily white with a quilted texture, transitioning to a vibrant orange towards the toe and sole, and is accented by a large black Nike Swoosh logo on both sides. The shoe has orange laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and a low-cut collar lined with black and orange for comfort and support. The sole is molded with multiple orange studs designed for traction on grass or turf surfaces. The overall construction suggests synthetic leather or similar materials for durability and lightweight performance, with a cushioned interior for foot support. The shoe appears clean, structurally intact, and in new condition, suitable for use in urban sports fields or recreational parks.
description: A white, orange, and black Nike soccer cleat with a quilted upper, orange laces, and molded orange studs for traction. The shoe is clean, modern, and designed for athletic use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the white upper, orange sole and laces, and a large black Nike Swoosh logo.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the orange heel, black collar lining, and visible stitching along the back.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the orange toe area, black Swoosh, and detailed sole studs.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the orange laces, quilted white toe box, and the Nike logo on the tongue.
attribute_logo: Large black Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe
